title: SAO HUD
description: Sword Art Online HUD for Minecraft
body:
⚔️ **Sword Art Online** ⚔️

SAO HUD in Minecraft ! 

This fully optimized mod displays Sword Art Online-style icons and health bars on all creatures, and provides a player UI overhaul to match the anime’s aesthetic



⚙️ **Configuration**

A configuration file named saohud-common.toml can be found in the config folder. It allows you to adjust parameters of the HUD.



📜 **Informations**

If you're interested in using it or feel some features are missing, feel free to contact me, I'm open to feedback and suggestions ! Join my Discord.
